name: Saransh Sharma
quote: It’s not about why we’re here. It’s about what we do now that we are.
bio: Architected the entire backend infrastructure and oversaw the end-to-end deployment. Focused on creating a scalable, high-performance engine that handles the heavy lifting of Kaizen AI.

name: Yug Trivedi
quote: Good code is like a good habit — consistent, clean, and built one step at a time.
bio: Contributed to the initial system brainstorming and frontend architecture. Provided essential support in bridging the gap between user interface and backend logic.

name: Prerna Dixit
quote: I map loopholes in your alibi. kaizen does the rest.
bio: Instrumental in crafting the layout designs and frontend aesthetics. Passionate about creating intuitive interfaces that make complex AI functions feel accessible and visually engaging.
